2021.summary: Foundation phase: initial product, backend API, and data ingestion systems were established to support core functionality.
annual_report: Delivered the initial version of the Hippo application
Defined API structure aligning mobile and backend systems
Developed core backend API and service communication
Established endpoints for product, deal, and user workflows
Built initial product and deal scraping systems
Developed metadata and link crawlers to enrich datasets
Established the foundation of the data acquisition pipeline

2022.summary: Stabilization and growth phase: improved application architecture, introduced social features, and strengthened infrastructure and data pipelines.
annual_report: Led project management and coordinated development timelines
Refactored and redesigned the application to improve performance and maintainability
Implemented critical API updates aligned with product requirements
Developed UI screens for products, collections, and deals
Introduced social features including likes and comments
Implemented CI/CD pipelines and testing infrastructure
Enhanced scraping systems, improving data quality and coverage
Decommissioned legacy Hadoop-based pipeline after infrastructure failure
Avoided high-cost vendor lock-in and initiated transition to new data solutions

2023.summary: Platform evolution phase: major backend upgrades, data pipeline modernization, and introduction of real-time and media capabilities.
annual_report: Refactored the application to improve scalability, performance, and maintainability
Developed and deployed notifications and video services
Maintained and enhanced core backend with new features and bug fixes
Migrated database from H2 to PostgreSQL for improved reliability
Extended product lookup capabilities with URL-based support
Improved codebase structure and overall system stability
Built scalable scraping and data processing workflows in Python
Reverse engineered external APIs to enrich product datasets
Rebuilt and modernized the data processing pipeline
Decommissioned legacy Hadoop infrastructure and simplified the tech stack
Initiated development of distributed processing using Spark
Rebuilt browser extension to align with updated platform requirements

2024.summary: Rebuild and optimization phase: full system redesign, infrastructure simplification, and significant cost reduction with improved scalability.
annual_report: Rebuilt the application with a scalable and maintainable architecture
Improved code quality, stability, and development velocity
Simplified system architecture by removing unused components
Integrated Apache Solr for scalable search capabilities
Designed and implemented a new indexing pipeline
Built and scaled data processing pipelines across all partitions
Developed recommendation systems and product grouping features
Generated product collections from external data sources
Developed a new web platform and admin panel for product management
Decommissioned distributed data pipelines and reduced infrastructure complexity
Reduced cloud infrastructure footprint by 75%
Improved overall system performance and reliability

2025.summary: Release and scaling phase: public launch, continued backend improvements, and scaling of data processing and search capabilities.
annual_report: Deployed application to internal testing environments
Released Android application to Google Play Store
Designed and implemented new indexing and search services
Expanded API capabilities for search and data workflows
Scaled data processing pipelines across all partitions
Enhanced data structures for large-scale product processing
Improved recommendation, grouping, and search data pipelines
Stabilized and optimized data processing systems

2023.summary: Initial development phase: core platform architecture, mobile app creation, and foundational features were established, with a private beta release.
annual_report: Defined and documented technical specifications for the Teamboost API and mobile application
Developed the Teamboost mobile and web applications
Released the mobile application for private beta testing
Implemented core features including tasks, projects, task groups, and labels
Developed onboarding, notifications, and organization management services
Established backend architecture supporting onboarding, real-time notifications, and organizational workflows
Designed and developed the tasks service enabling core task management functionality

2024.summary: Expansion phase: major feature rollout, backend scalability improvements, and introduction of collaboration, reporting, and internationalization capabilities.
annual_report: Continued development of the Teamboost mobile and web applications
Implemented key features including Questions, Releases, Insights, and Daily Reports
Added internationalization support for multiple languages and regional formats
Designed and built an in-app reporting system for user feedback
Created and maintained technical specifications for the Teamboost API
Enhanced onboarding, organization management, and notifications services
Expanded backend with services including DMS, reminders, EWS, requests/questions, comments, and attachments
Improved backend scalability for communication, collaboration, and content management
Enhanced the tasks service to support new features and evolving requirements
Performed testing, product ideation, and backend operational support

2025.summary: Release and stabilization phase: public rollout, improved reliability through testing, and continued enhancement of core features and system performance.
annual_report: Released the first private version via TestFlight and coordinated initial App Store launch
Continued improving the mobile and web applications, enhancing core features and user experience
Expanded automated test coverage across the platform
Enhanced onboarding, organization management, and notifications services
Extended backend services (DMS, reminders, EWS, requests/questions, comments, attachments) with new features
Improved system stability and performance
Enhanced the tasks service and related workflows
Implemented automated tests for task-related functionality
Introduced new web application design and continued feature development

2021.summary: Early exploration phase: initial campaign-management server work.
annual_report: Worked on a ghost server for campaign management.

2022.summary: Continued delivery on the Corporation’s web stack and APIs with contractor teams in Poland, Romania, and Portugal.
annual_report: Maintained and extended core HTTP APIs and server-side services for the Corporation’s web applications
Released iterative UI and workflow improvements on the primary web product
Coordinated contractor engineering across Poland, Romania, and Portugal (no development work was performed in Bosnia and Herzegovina)
Ran staging and production workloads on DigitalOcean and Hetzner

2023.summary: Ongoing web and API development with distributed contractors in Poland, Romania, and Portugal.
annual_report: Extended API coverage and reliability for customer-facing web workflows
Hardened authentication and session handling paths on the web stack
Continued contractor-led development in Poland, Romania, and Portugal
Refined deployment and monitoring on DigitalOcean and Hetzner

2024.summary: Product and intern contributions: summer intern work alongside core web and API maintenance.
annual_report: Interns contributed to web features and QA during the summer program
Maintained API and web application releases through the remainder of the year
Continued use of contractor development centers in Poland, Romania, and Portugal
Kept hosting footprint on DigitalOcean and Hetzner under review

2025.summary: Continued web/API iteration with intern support and contractor teams in Poland, Romania, and Portugal.
annual_report: Summer interns supported feature development and testing on the web stack
Shipped maintenance releases for APIs and supporting services
Sustained contractor coordination in Poland, Romania, and Portugal
Documented hosting and backup posture on DigitalOcean and Hetzner

2026.summary: Planning and build-out phase: system flow definition and initial data systems.
annual_report: Defined end-to-end system flows for upcoming releases
Started data collection and aggregation prototypes aligned with the web stack
Aligned contractor roadmap across Poland, Romania, and Portugal

2023.summary: Foundation phase: international sourcing for field hockey manufacturing through a dedicated agent in Sialkot, Pakistan.
annual_report: Commenced global sourcing by engaging a dedicated agent in Sialkot, Pakistan, a major hub for field hockey manufacturing, to identify high-quality stick manufacturers

2024.summary: Strategic partnerships and logistics: executive networking in Europe and first major inbound shipment of outdoor field hockey sticks.
annual_report: Conducted executive-level meetings with industry contacts, including Zulfiqar Malik in Belgrade, Serbia, and Ali Malik in Coventry, England
Completed a first major logistics milestone by receiving a shipment of outdoor field hockey sticks from Malik Hockey routed through Hoegaarden, Belgium

2025.summary: Expansion and diversification: new partnerships in Europe and Africa, supply-chain optimization in Sialkot, U.S. market entry, and expanded transatlantic shipments to Berlin.
annual_report: Formalized partnerships with new entities in Berlin, Germany, and Pretoria, South Africa
Diversified the supply chain by appointing a new lead agent in Sialkot and onboarding AliTra as an additional manufacturing factory in Sialkot
Launched commercial distribution of AliTra sticks in the New York market
Expanded transatlantic logistics with significant shipments to Berlin, including AliTra indoor and outdoor sticks and Malik junior outdoor sticks
